name: Spinach Stuffed Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cook spinach as directed on package; drain well.
3. Cook shells as directed; drain and cool.
4. In a large bowl, mix chopped onion, chicken bullion, garlic powder, thyme, ricotta cheese, cottage cheese, eggs, and cooked spinach.
5. Using your hands and a large spoon, stuff shells with the mixture, and lay in rows in a 13-inch x 9-inch baking pan.
6. Spread spaghetti sauce over the shells in the pan. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella on top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 - 35 minutes, until warm in the center and mozzarella cheese has melted.
